title: Donald Trump celebrates the 250th anniversary of US independence with a patriotic speech and criticism of his opponents
summary: The US president highlights the country's strength and freedom amid the 250th anniversary festivities.

title: Incumbent Shiga Governor Mikazuki Taizo wins re-election for a fourth term
summary: The Shiga prefectural gubernatorial election was won by the incumbent, defeating three new candidates.

title: The Hayabusa2 probe successfully approaches asteroid Trifne for observation
summary: The Japanese spacecraft completed a high-speed flyby of the small asteroid, collecting key data for planetary defense.

title: OPEC and its allies agree to increase oil production in August for the fifth consecutive month
summary: Major oil-producing countries decide to expand supply to stabilize prices and respond to the resumption of exports from Ormuz.

title: Warning of torrential rain in northern Kyushu and possible formation of linear rainbands
summary: Meteorological authorities warn of heavy rain that could cause flooding in western Japan.

title: Suspected high-ranking member of international criminal organization 'Prince G' re-arrested in Japan
summary: The suspect, wanted by the US, allegedly attempted to permanently settle in the country in violation of immigration laws.

title: Rookie Kurabayashi Beni achieves her first victory on the women's professional golf circuit
summary: In the LPGA of Japan tournament, the 21-year-old player prevailed in a record seven-player playoff.

title: Japanese skaters dominate the Chiba X Games with gold medals in skateboarding
summary: In the street and park skateboarding competition, Japanese athletes like Onodera Ginryu and Nishiya Momiji stood out.

title: China and Russia begin joint naval exercises with deployment in the Pacific
summary: The military maneuvers aim to strengthen cooperation between the two powers and could involve movements near Japan.

title: China releases unregistered Christian pastor ahead of Xi Jinping's visit to the US
summary: The pastor, imprisoned for illegal activities, was released and traveled to the United States following Trump's efforts.

title: Japan's ruling party debates reducing consumption tax on food to ease economic pressure
summary: The chairman of the tax research committee stresses the urgency of defining a direction so that the measure is ready for April.

title: Nine years since devastating floods in northern Kyushu, ceremonies held in memory of the victims
summary: Residents and authorities remember the deceased and renew their commitment to reconstruction without leaving anyone behind.

title: Family and politicians attend memorial service for former Prime Minister Shinzo Abe four years after his assassination
summary: His widow Akie Abe and the Minister of Internal Affairs participated in the ceremony held in Yamaguchi.

title: Japan's taxi industry sees a rejuvenation of its drivers thanks to ride-hailing apps
summary: Ride-hailing platforms have facilitated the entry of new drivers, even those without experience, in urban areas.

title: Two bear incidents in Japan raise safety concerns in rural areas
summary: In Hokkaido and Yamagata, bears attacked hikers and a plant gatherer, resulting in injuries.

title: French national football team advances to quarterfinals after defeating Morocco and Paraguay
summary: Kylian Mbappé matches Messi with seven goals, while Dembélé stands out with a key assist in the penalty shootout.

title: Funeral for Iran's supreme leader continues, plans to invite families of school attack victims to Hiroshima
summary: Amid the funeral ceremonies, a Japanese NGO proposes bringing an Iranian delegation to participate in the peace memorial.

title: Five kittens considered the oldest in the world and a sea lion pup born in Japanese zoos
summary: The new offspring in Kobe and Niigata attract visitors for their cuteness and rarity.

title: Standout players of the Japanese Professional League shine in various season games
summary: Sasahara of the Giants hits his first go-ahead home run, Kondo of SoftBank hits a two-run triple, and Espinoza of Orix earns his seventh win.

title: Veteran Kazuyoshi Miura will play in J3 and former World Cup player Ando Kozue joins Tokyo Verdy
summary: Two legendary Japanese footballers change teams for the upcoming season in search of new challenges.
